faq.question: How is a landing page different from a full website?
faq.answer: A landing page is a single-page website focused on one key action: booking or ordering. For restaurants, this is the ideal format.

faq.question: Can I show the menu and prices on the landing page?
faq.answer: Yes, menu blocks with dish photos and prices are added to the page — all on one page.

faq.question: How does online booking work?
faq.answer: A booking form is set up — guest selects date, time, and party size, and you receive the data.

faq.question: Will the landing page appear in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, landing pages are SEO-optimized and indexed by Google and Yandex.

faq.question: Can I change the design after creation?
faq.answer: Yes, in the editor you can change texts, photos, colors, and block order on the page.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a restaurant landing page?
faq.answer: You can create a landing page for free. Paid plans give access to domain and additional features.
